curation_notes: Pre-assigned as insecure-deserialization from CWE-502, but the vulnerability is signature malleability due to missing range validation on deserialized signature components — reclassified to crypto-weakness. The patch adds checks in the SetBytes function for both ECDSA and EdDSA Signature types to ensure R and S are non-zero and less than the relevant modulus. The fix is replicated across 21 curve-specific marshal.go files (11 ECDSA + 10 EdDSA) generated from two templates. All locations list the same vulnerable function (SetBytes on Signature) in each curve's marshal.go.
